title: PREPARE crashes mserver if unbound variable is function parameter
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = lower(NULL);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Test Name';
key_bug_features: Unbound variable as function parameter in PREPARE statement
